description: All three locale files have nav keys for role-based navigation
steps: Open packages/web/lib/i18n/en.json and verify nav.findContractors, nav.browseProjects, nav.myProjects exist
Open packages/web/lib/i18n/bs.json and verify same keys exist with Bosnian translations
Open packages/web/lib/i18n/de.json and verify same keys exist with German translations

description: All three locale files have applications section with full translation keys
steps: Open en.json and verify applications section exists with keys: applyToProject, browseProjectsTitle, browseProjectsDesc, messageLabel, messagePlaceholder, specialtyLabel, proposedRate, currency, optional, submitApplication, submitSuccess, submitFailed, alreadyApplied, applyNow, noProjects, noApplications, total, pendingCount, filterAll, filterPending, filterAccepted, filterRejected, accept, reject, rejectReason, rejectReasonPlaceholder, confirmReject, acceptSuccess, acceptFailed, rejectSuccess, rejectFailed, companyNotes, status.pending, status.accepted, status.rejected, status.withdrawn
Open bs.json and verify same applications section keys exist
Open de.json and verify same applications section keys exist

description: Locale files have contractor directory and building tab keys
steps: Open en.json and verify contractors.directoryTitle and contractors.directoryDesc exist
Open en.json and verify buildings.tabApplications exists
Open bs.json and verify same keys exist
Open de.json and verify same keys exist
